title: Basic SQL Insert Statement
scenario: Generate an SQL insert statement that inserts a new employee into the 'employees' table, given the following data: 'John Doe', 30, '2022-01-01'.
constraints: Must be a single insert statement

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated statement should be a single insert statement and use the VALUES keyword.
The generated statement should have valid syntax and be free of syntax errors.
The generated statement should correctly insert the employee data into the 'employees' table.
